name: pica-tutor
displayName: Pica — learn the code your AI writes
description: A pixel cat that rides along with your AI coding agent, explains the code it writes in designer language, and drills you until it sticks.

commands.title: Pica: Blank This File for Practice

pica.model.description: OpenRouter model for Pica's text (teaching, chat, games). Use a ':free' model to run without credits — e.g. nousresearch/hermes-3-llama-3.1-405b:free, qwen/qwen3-coder:free, meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free.

pica.visionModel.description: OpenRouter vision model for analysing attached screenshots/images (Hermes is text-only). Default is free.

pica.agentName.description: The coding agent Pica narrates, e.g. 'Claude Code', 'Cursor', 'Hermes'. Leave blank to auto-detect from the workspace (falls back to 'your agent').
